name: SwaTex

descFull: 99.9% KaTeX syntax coverage. LaTeX math renderer in pure Swift. No JavaScript, no WebView, no DOM. One Swift core → iOS, macOS, tvOS, watchOS, visionOS. SwiftUI · UIKit/AppKit · SVG · PNG. 2.4× the Rust reference engine. Zero re-rasterization scrolling for block editors. By Phrase (phrase.so).
